top_claims.claim: EPS (basic) growth moved from +13.3% to +9.0% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

Danaher is a DBS-driven compounder in biotechnology, life sciences, and diagnostics (post-Veralto separation). FY2025 FCF per share is about $7.34 (OCF $6.42B less capex $1.16B). Q1 2026 shows modest re-acceleration ($5.95B revenue, operating margin ~22.5%). At ~$172 (NYSE, May 2026), Lawrence base 10yr IRR is 10.1% (b
We expect **12.01%** per year over 7 years at **~$172.29** on **$7.34/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: Multi-year biopharma funding downturn reducing Cytiva/bioprocessing volumes and delaying tools recovery.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Multi-year biopharma funding downturn reducing Cytiva/bioprocessing volumes and delaying tools recovery.
China diagnostics core sales declines persisting beyond cyclical norm.
Apr 2026 424B5 financing/dilution until use of proceeds is clear.
